Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | INSIDE ELECTIONS “As President Donald Trump continues to struggle in the suburbs, Kulkarni and candidates like him will be in a strong position to increase the Democratic majority even further.” | = Friend, We’re 99 days away from Election Day, and we are so proud of our team and the work we’ve accomplished so far! Over the course of the past few months, we’ve seen incredible momentum for our campaign, proving that we are the frontrunners to represent TX-22 in Congress. → This week, the Daily Kos declared our race a toss-up, which means we have a real shot at making history and flipping this seat blue. → The National Journal put us on their power rankings of the most flippable races in the country. → And Inside Elections , a reputable nonpartisan analysis publication, just ranked our race as a toss-up as well. In a historically red district, this is further proof that we can win. Sri isn’t in this fight for media attention -- he’s running to put the issues of Texas families front and center in Washington.But this kind of national recognition means that all eyes are on this race, and it means that we’re poised to bring change to our community --but only if we keep our momentum going. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Team Sri | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Amy
subject: We need an educator in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
Hello, As the pandemic continues to drive the largest public health and economic crises in generations, Republicans in Congress keep failing to offer the relief and support our communities need to beat this crisis. **Instead, they’re talking about using federal funding to force schools to re-open under any circumstances -- regardless of what the science says about the dangers of opening back up too soon.** It’s clear we need responsible leadership now more than ever to protect the safety of students and teachers. Amy is a former public school teacher and mother of five. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's attacks aren't letting up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is just the warm-up for what's to come.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, _"Radical left."_ That's what Donald Trump called me when I said I was thrilled that Joe Biden is embracing bold ideas to defeat climate change and create millions of union jobs. Ideas I've been proud to champion, along with you, for years: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9889?t=5&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS) Not long after, the RNC piled on to call us "far-left." This is proof that the GOP has their sights still set on defeating me and flipping this seat. They will continue to attack me at every opportunity. **We've set an ambitious goal of raising $75,000 by midnight on Friday as part of our end-of-month fundraising push. This is our last end-of-month deadline ahead of the primary, before the general election starts in earnest. Every grassroots donation will go into fighting back against these GOP attacks as Washingtonians start to vote.** **[Will you donate $5 or more right now to help hit our last pre-primary, end-of-month goal and fight back against these attacks?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9889?t=6&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9927?t=7&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9928?t=8&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9890?t=9&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9891?t=10&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9892?t=11&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9889?t=12&akid=8107%2E868730%2Esp_fSS)
---
It's clear that Donald Trump and his allies are laser-focused on Democratic governors like myself and the only three other seats they can focus on this November.
We know this is just the warm-up before the attacks start to get really brutal -- and we have to be ready.
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mary=20Eisenhower?=
subject: Why I support Tracey Mann
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/traceymann/update-6951372?e=a9d1410029)
---
| |
---
| | Kansans,

Our country seems at a crossroads. There is so much frustration, anger and pain on all sides of the political spectrum.

Now is the time to elect men and women who know right from wrong, who understand the foundations of our country are good and righteous, who know that America is a good country made up of good people always seeking a more perfect union.

Tracey Mann is the right man to represent us in these extraordinary times. He is a man of deep faith, strong conviction, and conservative values to his core. Tracey Mann embodies all the traits that my grandfather, President Eisenhower valued in public servants – honesty, integrity and working hard for the people you serve. It is an honor for me to endorse Tracey Mann for Congress.

I am excited to go vote next Tuesday in Abilene because I am excited to vote for Tracey. I hope you consider joining me in supporting his campaign!

Respectfully,

Mary Eisenhower

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: If You Climb on Top of and Beat an Innocent Stranger's Car, You're a Violent Criminal Who Deserves Prison
body:
The violence in Portland and other major U.S. cities is “slowly percolating across entire cityscapes . . . Nip these escalations in the bud" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f01f6b4a83&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **If You Climb on Top of and Beat an Innocent Stranger's Car, You're a Violent Criminal Who Deserves Prison**

The violence in Portland and other major U.S. cities is “slowly percolating across entire cityscapes, and unless these criminals are treated as such, there is zero incentive for this to end,” Tiana Lowe writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“Nip these escalations in the bud, lest [more places] become Seattle, where law enforcement is so restrained they're warning property and business owners that they can no longer help them.”

[Click here to read more and watch the videos.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bfea77a82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Many media outlets have steadfastly described the violent riots that have gripped cities across the country in recent months as ‘mostly peaceful protests.’ What’s left out of this absurd description is the arson, assault, vandalism, and wanton destruction that people can view through social media or with their own eyes,” Mollie Hemingway writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a290cc6638&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump will tour a North Carolina plant today that is working quickly toward a Coronavirus vaccine. “Trump will discuss the collaboration between his administration and the private sector to rapidly develop a vaccine and ensure accelerated manufacturing and distribution once ready,” Matthew Burns reports for North Carolina’s [WRAL News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29fad38876&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “American workers and businesses have a shared interest in developing high-quality skills for the workplace—and that this doesn’t necessarily require a four-year degree. Instead, there are a broad range of courses, certifications, and apprenticeships that give workers the skills they need for growing fields like health care, cybersecurity, and the skilled trades,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross and Labor Secretary Eugene Scalia write in [_The Advocate_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b15a56bf6a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=860eb49e23&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c965cd912&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5d4a25333a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Friend,

I’m writing to you today, because we are quickly approaching our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline and I need your help.

We’ve set a fundraising goal to raise $20,000 online before the end of the month and we are still $12,500 away from reaching this must-hit goal before our Friday deadline. It may seem like a long way to go, but if I can count on supporters like you to contribute whatever amount you can afford right now, we can reach this critical goal — together.

**We have a tough race ahead of us, and we have a very real chance to flip this seat and finally deliver proper representation in Congress to the people of the Suncoast. But in order for us to flip this seat from red to blue, it’s going to take a lot of resources to fight back against the attacks headed my way.**

**[We simply can’t afford to have Vern Buchanan continue to represent us in Congress, just like we can’t afford to miss this fundraising goal before our end-of-month deadline. Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

name: Team Joe
subject: It all comes down to this, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We don't take a single vote for granted. |
---
Peter, it's Elana, Joe Biden's Online Fundraising Director.

I know we send a lot of emails asking for contributions, and those emails are critical because we need the resources to reach undecided voters, who likely aren't receiving our emails.

Their ultimate support is critical in cementing our path to 270 electoral votes on November 3rd, but so is your vote, Peter! **While we've told you this before, it bears repeating: we don't take a single vote for granted.**

So I make it a point every month to check in with everyone on our list and make sure we can count on your vote this fall. And even if you remember responding to a poll like this one before, we're asking you one more time today to re-confirm your support for Joe Biden in the November election.

[We didn't get a response from you on our July voting survey, and we're looking to lock in another 900 responses from Pennsylvania before midnight. Can you weigh in right now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debac/2133175724/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS") __| __| __ **RECORD FOR PETER WILLIS**

**State:** Pennsylvania
**Poll Response in July?** No, not yet!
**Responses needed before midnight:** 900

Peter, share your response right now. Do you plan to vote for Joe Biden this fall in Pennsylvania?

| | [YES >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debac/2133175724/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS")
---
| [NO >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debac/2133175724/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS")
---
| [UNDECIDED >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debac/2133175724/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.19_B3_vote4joe_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS")
---
__
__
__
Thanks for your time and support!

Elana Firsht
Online Fundraising Director
Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debab/2133175724/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357debaa/2133175724/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba9/2133175724/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba8/2133175724/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba7/2133175724/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba6/2133175724/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba5/2133175724/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba4/2133175724/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba3/2133175724/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba2/2133175724/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba5/2133175724/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba1/2133175724/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba4/2133175724/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b94b/1cd0ac28/1754a266b/357deba0/2133175724/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**BREAKING: Justice Ginsburg treated for cancer**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df9/2629064944/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-well-rbg?source=20200725_em_pet_b1_jguv_90") [20,000 WELL WISHES NEEDED: Will you sign the card to wish Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg a speedy recovery? We want to surprise her with a card signed by 20,000 of her biggest fans. We know she'll be so touched and encouraged to see how Americans have her back right now >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df9/2629064944/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-well-rbg?source=20200725_em_pet_b1_jguv_90") Ruth Bader Ginsburg is one of the fiercest Supreme Court Justices in human history. But she just announced she is undergoing treatment for cancer. [**_We need a swift and POWERFUL surge of support to let RBG know we have her back. Will you wish Justice Ginsburg a speedy recovery before midnight? We know she 'll be so touched to see your name on her card >>_ **](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df9/2629064944/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-well-rbg?source=20200725_em_pet_b1_jguv_90") | [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df9/2629064944/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-well-rbg?source=20200725_em_pet_b1_jguv_90")
---

Justice Ginsburg is one of the most courageous women on the planet.

We know there is no one tougher, stronger, and more prepared to beat cancer than RBG.

Will you sign the card and help us show Justice Ginsburg a powerful surge of encouragement? _You can even leave her a personal note._

[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Will you sign the card to wish Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg a speedy recovery? We want to surprise her with well wishes from 20,000 of her biggest fans. We know she'll be so touched to see your name >> ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df9/2629064944/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-well-rbg?source=20200725_em_pet_b1_jguv_90")

Thank you,

Team BRL

[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dfe/2629064944/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dff/2629064944/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dfc/2629064944/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dfd/2629064944/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df2/2629064944/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df3/2629064944/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df0/2629064944/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dfc/2629064944/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213dfe/2629064944/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b349/18e32a7f/4db44348/7b213df1/2629064944/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Stay safe with a Fair Fight purple VOTE mask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We've partnered with Resistance By Design to create masks that will help keep people healthy and encourage them to vote |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45a/34a064cc/1bed702c/702e5c7/564221862/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - We know that wearing a mask is one simple yet extremely important thing we can all do to help prevent the spread of COVID-19, so why not wear a mask that will make a difference? [**I am excited to announce that Fair Fight has partnered with Resistance By Design to produce purple VOTE masks.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45a/34a064cc/1bed702c/702e5c4/564221862/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight") These 100% cotton masks are proudly Union made in the USA, and a portion of the proceeds will go to support our work at Fair Fight. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45a/34a064cc/1bed702c/702e5c4/564221862/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight") With only **99 more days until Election Day** , now more than ever it is critical every eligible voter is able to have their voice heard and their vote counted. Fair Fight has been working hard to make sure elections are free and fair for all, but with the threat of COVID-19 still very real, we also have to make sure they are safe. [**Will you support Fair Fight 's work by purchasing a purple VOTE mask from Resistance By Design today? Fair Fight will also be donating a portion of the proceeds from these sales to the Southern Center for Human Rights, which works for equality, dignity, and justice for people impacted by the criminal legal system in the Deep South.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45a/34a064cc/1bed702c/702e5c5/564221862/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight") On behalf of Fair Fight, I want to thank you for your support of safe and accessible voting amid COVID-19. I hope you will join us in the fight for free and fair elections. -Stacey [Get Your Mask](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45a/34a064cc/1bed702c/702e5c4/564221862/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight")

"" These 100% cotton masks are proudly Union made in the USA, and a portion of the proceeds will go to support our work at Fair Fight. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can you make a donation today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The fight for social, racial, and economic justice has reached a new threshold. Coronavirus is raging out of control. Unemployment is at Great Depression levels. And Trump is unable to govern at even | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525003/45c30650/1cc1b6894/66e87aa3/185833944/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Less than 100 days from Election Day, our country is in crisis.

The fight for social, racial, and economic justice has reached a new threshold. Coronavirus is raging out of control. Unemployment is at Great Depression levels. And Trump is unable to govern at even the most elementary level.

But if we work together -- if we fight together -- if we persist together -- we can elect new leaders who will make decisions with compassion, common sense, and moral clarity.

**The next 100 days will decide what kind of country we build together.** And earning people's votes takes time -- we need to be reaching out, person to person, right now, to make sure everyone makes their voice heard this November. Especially this year when more voters than ever will cast their ballots before November.

**So the next four days before our July fundraising deadline will decide what kind of investments we can make in grassroots organizing to win big across the country in the coming months.**

**[If we don't hit our goal by Friday, we won't have all the resources we need to keep growing our movement. If you're able to, please pitch in $2 or whatever makes sense right now-- it would make a real difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525003/45c30650/1cc1b6894/66e87aa4/185833944/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDIxRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA3MjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT21F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200727_V1S3_P")**

In the past month, alongside grassroots supporters like you, we've endorsed dozens more Democrats running across the country.

These Warren Democrats will make us proud by fighting for the bold reforms we need at every level of government. But to elect them in 2020, we need to keep making serious investments in person-to-person organizing.

This is our moment to build back our economy and our government better than ever before. So when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did to end one of the worst chapters in our nation's modern history, we can tell them we changed America.

**Grassroots supporters like you are the only people who can make it possible to win in 2020 and make big, structural change in 2021 and beyond.**

[If you can, will you help hit this goal by Friday's fundraising deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525003/45c30650/1cc1b6894/66e87aa4/185833944/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDIxRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA3MjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT21F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200727_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525003/45c30650/1cc1b6894/66e87aa4/185833944/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDIxRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA3MjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT21F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200727_V1S3_P")
---

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg-1DHQMQBqCyYYFcJEVoku_nwx1ZX1WSaj7CsMt8eY=/RGebTYvNCw_6A3QMl3zioxVXXQjob4xYAApZ9SNFhHs=?refcode=200727-email) Peter, I wanted to let you know why I'm excited for Rita Hart to continue the tradition of effective, democratic leadership in IA-02. But first, Rita needs our help. **[Will you donate $15 today to help Rita raise as much as she can before her July 31st deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg-1DHQMQBqCyYYFcJEVoku_nwx1ZX1WSaj7CsMt8eY=/RGebTYvNCw_6A3QMl3zioxVXXQjob4xYAApZ9SNFhHs=?refcode=200727-email&amount=15)** Take it from me: as Assistant Attorney General and now as our State Auditor, I've taken on big challenges and made sure that corrupt officials from both parties were responsible for their actions. Rita is ready to take on the same challenges. That's why I'm proud to lend her my support. Rita is a leader for the people and will put politics aside to tackle corruption and hold Washington accountable. **[But she can't win without all of us doing all we can to make that happen. Will you donate today? Even a $10 donation can make a huge difference in a race this competitive.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg-1DHQMQBqCyYYFcJEVoku_nwx1ZX1WSaj7CsMt8eY=/RGebTYvNCw_6A3QMl3zioxVXXQjob4xYAApZ9SNFhHs=?refcode=200727-email&amount=10)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: _ | ****[CONTRIBUTE $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg-1DHQMQBqCyYYFcJEVoku_nwx1ZX1WSaj7CsMt8eY=/RGebTYvNCw_6A3QMl3zioxVXXQjob4xYAApZ9SNFhHs=?refcode=200727-email&amount=5&express_lanes=true)****

Iowan families need Rita Hart because she is listening. She knows that we're worried about our health care and our children's futures. She knows we're worried about our seniors and economy.
And she'll keep listening to us when she's in Washington, using our voices to direct her in Congress.
She has the momentum. She has the support; now she just needs the resources to win this race!
**[Chip-in $15 today and be a part of continuing IA-02's tradition of sending real, respectful leaders to Congress. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg-1DHQMQBqCyYYFcJEVoku_nwx1ZX1WSaj7CsMt8eY=/RGebTYvNCw_6A3QMl3zioxVXXQjob4xYAApZ9SNFhHs=?refcode=200727-email&amount=15)**
Thank you,
Rob Sand

body:

**Joe Biden's vice presidential shortlist is clear - and _The Hill_ reports he could announce his pick any day now! **

**Friend, we need to hear from top Democrats like you before it's too late:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cheryl=20Reynolds=20and=20Don=20Alexander?=
subject: Why we support Jake LaTurner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

As many of you know, Don Alexander and I have committed many years to the important work of ensuring we have solid, Republican leaders in Kansas to represent us at the local, state, and national level. We are sending you this letter today in our personal capacities, and with just as much resolve as we do when serving as Chair and Vice Chair for the Kansas second district Republicans. As a Party, it is critical that we elect people to represent us that have integrity. Plain and simple.

In the race for the 2nd district congressional race, that person is Jake LaTurner. We have chosen to voice our public support for Jake as the candidate we endorse for the 2nd district seat in U.S. Congress because we know him to be an honest man of his word who will represent us well in Washington, D.C.

[Would you consider pitching in to help Jake's campaign for Congress?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b325dea217&e=1050d051da)

The Democrats are pulling out all the stops to back the mayor of Topeka as their likely candidate for the 2nd congressional district. She will be an extremely tough candidate to beat, but Jake can do it. He has an irrefutable conservative record and the leadership ability to go to D.C. and fight for our Kansas values.

To lose another House seat in Kansas would be devastating. We hope you will consider supporting Jake as our next Republican Congressman. Some of you have already received your early ballot. Please be sure to send it in. The August primary is just over a week away, and your vote truly matters.

Let's send a trusted conservative to Washington, D.C.!

[You can help support Jake's campaign by donating at this link.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bf9af9017b&e=1050d051da)

Sincerely,

Cheryl Reynolds and Don Alexander

---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, As many of you know, Don Alexander and I have committed many years to the important work of ensuring we have solid, Republican leaders in Kansas to represent us at the local, state, and national level. We are sending you this letter today in our personal capacities, and with just as much resolve as we do when serving as Chair and Vice Chair for the Kansas second district Republicans. As a Party, it is critical that we elect people to represent us that have integrity. Plain and simple. In the race for the 2nd district congressional race, that person is Jake LaTurner. We have chosen to voice our public support for Jake as the candidate we endorse for the 2nd district seat in U.S. Congress because we know him to be an honest man of his word who will represent us well in Washington, D.C. The Democrats are pulling out all the stops to back the mayor of Topeka as their likely candidate for the 2nd congressional district. She will be an extremely tough candidate to beat, but Jake can do it. He has an irrefutable conservative record and the leadership ability to go to D.C. and fight for our Kansas values. To lose another House seat in Kansas would be devastating. We hope you will consider supporting Jake as our next Republican Congressman. Some of you have already received your early ballot. Please be sure to send it in. The August primary is just over a week away, and your vote truly matters. Let's send a trusted conservative to Washington, D.C.! Sincerely, Cheryl Reynolds and Don Alexander | | "Help send a trusted Conservative to Congress" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © |2019| |LaTurner for Congress|, All rights reserved.

Never Trumpers fool themselves if they believe newly empowered Democrats would pursue the “nuclear option” to advance centrist, bipartisan policies. They pretend Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, not Sen. Joe Manchin, is the aberration within the Democratic Party. Democrats are committed to identity politics, increased regulation of the economy and people’s lives, and prioritization of wealth transfer over creation. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: What Kansans Want
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/what-kansans-want?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# I spent the weekend traveling across our state, talking to voters, sharing my message and listening. My stops are showing me that the momentum is there for our campaign and our message.

As I go to communities across our state people tell me that they want to drain the swamp in Washington. They want a senator who works for We The People, not the entrenched Washington establishment. They want a senator who believes in term limits and is not jumping from office to office.

Above all, I keep hearing how voters are tired of the negativity in this primary. They want Republicans to be focused on the issues and on nominating the best candidate to defeating Barbara Bollier. This is why I am running a positive campaign and not engaging in mudslinging. As Republicans our focus should be on stopping Barbara Bollier and not on tearing each other down.

As we head into the final week, please let your friends and family know about our campaign and why you are supporting me. Share our social networks ([Facebook](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=4ee61f79cd&e=41f8e27552), [Twitter](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=61ae9edf27&e=41f8e27552), [Instagram](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=eebcca94b3&e=41f8e27552)) on your social media. Let them know how they can [find their polling place](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=1c1a95bcc5&e=41f8e27552).

Working together we can win next week and defeat Barbara Bollier in November!

Dave

_P.S. – Check out photos from the Dickinson County Republican picnic in Abilene on Saturday.

_

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 36 Hours to go
body:
In 36 hours, our campaign has to report our Pre-Primary fundraising totals to the FEC.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385854-909711-5112992-c5d53a8494-b2a9add824)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385854-909711-5112992-c5d53a8494-b2a9add824) In 36 hours, our campaign has to report our Pre-Primary fundraising totals to the FEC.

[**Will you pitch in $10 to help us hit our goal?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385854-909711-5112992-c5d53a8494-b2a9add824)

Here’s just some of what we’ve been able to do so far to unseat radical Democrat Lois Frankel . . .
* Sent 707,000 text messages to voters
* Served video ads to 105,000 district voters
* Mailed voter cards to 35,000 primary voters
* Organized hundreds of sign waving events around the district
* Met with hundreds of small business owners and community leaders
* And on a national level, we’ve emailed MILLIONS of patriots around America.

Our efforts are making an impact and we have to keep on pushing.

[**Help fund our efforts by chipping in just $10 today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385854-909711-5112992-c5d53a8494-b2a9add824)

At midnight tomorrow night, we have to close the books and report to the FEC and we’re $28,800 away from our fundraising goal. [**Will you help us close the gap?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385854-909711-5112992-c5d53a8494-b2a9add824)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: | Hey, Did you catch my dad, Mike Espy, on MSNBC yesterday? My dad joined Jaime Harrison, fellow Black U.S. Senate candidate running in South Carolina, to talk about outraising our Republican incumbent opponents last quarter and creating a new South. = My dad went on to explain how our last race against Cindy Hyde-Smith in 2018 was just a prelude. This time around, we’re outraising our opponent, getting more national attention, and spreading the word across Mississippi – all thanks to support from folks like you. But if we’re going to beat the odds and win in November, we’ve got to keep this grassroots energy up for the next three months. Friday is our critical July fundraising deadline: Can you chip in $10 (or more!) to help us hit our $150,000 goal and fuel our campaign to move Mississippi forward? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = — Jamilla Espy Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

If we don’t stop this radical agenda, all of our kids will be taught that the only distinguishing feature of America is not our liberty, our fight against tyranny, or our work defeating fascism—it's that America is a fundamentally evil country.

Knowing that I have deeply committed conservative supporters like you gives me the strength to keep fighting back against the mainstream media and their continual smears.

We can be sure of this, Peter:

The momentum to flip Texas this November is very much real. We saw record shattering turnout in the runoff election, and **this campaign raised over $1 million** in the week following.

If we keep up this momentum, we will have the resources we need to win this campaign. But Sen. Cornyn's corporate PACs and big money donors have been pouring millions of dollars to save their stooge in the Senate, so we can't afford to let up. **[Donate today to help fight back!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891edb/7f51f7bc/40650671/4ef64f73/1489184530/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200727.2nd__1803__&amount=10")**

It's clear that after 18 years in Washington selling out working families to his special interest donors, Texans all over have had enough of Sen. Cornyn. MJ is ready to defeat him with the full force of this Texas-sized campaign behind her, but **[she needs your help to get the job done.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891edb/7f51f7bc/40650671/4ef64f73/1489184530/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200727.2nd__1803__&amount=10")**

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: Peter, I'm asking you to pitch in to restore dignified leadership to the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Our country is in desperate need of a leader whose word can be trusted. |
---
[](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2") Peter,

The consequences of this election will last for generations.

[That's why I'm reaching out to you to personally ask you to chip in $5 to elect Joe Biden today.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2")

I have been in politics for decades, and you can believe me when I tell you that the stakes have never been higher than the ones we face in this election. I'll tell you why.

American foreign policy under President Trump has been defined by a relentless effort to dismantle the system that the United States helped create after World War II to solve global problems.

Since the day he took office, Trump has abandoned vital diplomatic agreements, insulted our allies, and hurt our ability to work with other nations to address common threats.

At home, Trump has put our governing institutions at risk by undermining Congress, the courts, and his own federal agencies. He has disregarded science and twisted facts to suit his political agenda, while demonstrating an open disdain for democratic values.

With the spread of COVID-19, the folly of this approach is even more apparent. Trump fumbled his response to the pandemic so severely that the United States now leads the world in COVID-19 cases, and he has shown no leadership in trying to get the virus under control.

**Our country is in desperate need of a leader whose word can be trusted, whose ideals lift people up, and whose actions bring people together rather than driving them apart.**

[That leader is Joe Biden, Peter. And if you're able to give anything at all to make him our next President, I hope you'll give $5 today.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I have been privileged to know Joe for many years. When I served as the United States' ambassador to the United Nations and as Secretary of State, he was one of the Senate's leading voices on foreign policy, and his instincts on diplomacy often mirrored and reinforced my own.

At the time, one of the most challenging situations the world faced was in the Balkans, where Bosnia-Herzegovina was being ripped apart by aggression, women were being systematically raped, children were being killed by snipers, and whole villages were being ethnically cleansed.

_Instead of acting, the world community had tied itself into knots._

One of the few leaders who stood up and said, "This is wrong," was then-Sen. Joe Biden. He said, "Let us put power on the side of justice. Let us put an end to the hate and violence. Let us create a new Europe and a new century in which bigotry and ethnic cleansing have no place."

Joe Biden's leadership during the Bosnian War was exceptional, but it was also no exception.

In that moment, I saw the measure of a man who, throughout his career, has said what needed to be said, regardless of whether people of power wanted to hear it.

As a senator, he fought to ensure that our diplomats and service members had what they needed to succeed in their missions, leading the effort to procure life-saving mine-resistant vehicles for our troops in Iraq.

As Vice President, he secured ratification of a landmark nuclear arms treaty with Russia, strengthened relations with our partners throughout the Western Hemisphere, and helped bring China into a major international climate agreement.

Throughout his career, Joe Biden has fiercely defended America's interests, but he has always understood that our interests cannot be protected if we sacrifice our values. He will not make excuses for dictators in Cuba, Russia, or anywhere else. He is also a stalwart defender of U.S. allies, including Israel.

I know Joe Biden will be ready on Day One to lead as our commander in chief. That's why Barack Obama chose him as his Vice President. Joe has the energy, the experience, and the moral courage that our nation deserves and the future demands.

But he cannot do this alone. It's up to all of us to take a stand and do our part to support his fight in any way we can. I pledge to do everything in my power to help Joe defeat Donald Trump, and I'm asking you to do the same today.

[So I have to ask you one last time, Peter, if you want to see America represented on the world stage by a man who will restore our reputation and lead with compassion, honesty, and integrity, will you pitch in $5 before Joe Biden's end-of-month deadline?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.27_B2_albright_X__F1_S1_C2__full_T2")

Thank you for standing up for American values.

Madeleine Albright

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b943/1cd0ac28/17574cee7/357df7bd/1556768509/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b943/1cd0ac28/17574cee7/357df7b8/1556768509/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: Our country is in desperate need of a leader whose word can be trusted. | "" Peter, The consequences of this election will last for generations. "" I have been in politics for decades, and you can believe me when I tell you that the stakes have never been higher than the ones we face in this election. I'll tell you why. American foreign policy under President Trump has been defined by a relentless effort to dismantle the system that the United States helped create after World War II to solve global problems. Since the day he took office, Trump has abandoned vital diplomatic agreements, insulted our allies, and hurt our ability to work with other nations to address common threats. At home, Trump has put our governing institutions at risk by undermining Congress, the courts, and his own federal agencies. He has disregarded science and twisted facts to suit his political agenda, while demonstrating an open disdain for democratic values. With the spread of COVID-19, the folly of this approach is even more apparent. Trump fumbled his response to the pandemic so severely that the United States now leads the world in COVID-19 cases, and he has shown no leadership in trying to get the virus under control. Our country is in desperate need of a leader whose word can be trusted, whose ideals lift people up, and whose actions bring people together rather than driving them apart. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" I have been privileged to know Joe for many years. When I served as the United States' ambassador to the United Nations and as Secretary of State, he was one of the Senate's leading voices on foreign policy, and his instincts on diplomacy often mirrored and reinforced my own. At the time, one of the most challenging situations the world faced was in the Balkans, where Bosnia-Herzegovina was being ripped apart by aggression, women were being systematically raped, children were being killed by snipers, and whole villages were being ethnically cleansed. Instead of acting, the world community had tied itself into knots. One of the few leaders who stood up and said, "This is wrong," was then-Sen. Joe Biden. He said, "Let us put power on the side of justice. Let us put an end to the hate and violence. Let us create a new Europe and a new century in which bigotry and ethnic cleansing have no place." Joe Biden's leadership during the Bosnian War was exceptional, but it was also no exception. In that moment, I saw the measure of a man who, throughout his career, has said what needed to be said, regardless of whether people of power wanted to hear it. As a senator, he fought to ensure that our diplomats and service members had what they needed to succeed in their missions, leading the effort to procure life-saving mine-resistant vehicles for our troops in Iraq. As Vice President, he secured ratification of a landmark nuclear arms treaty with Russia, strengthened relations with our partners throughout the Western Hemisphere, and helped bring China into a major international climate agreement. Throughout his career, Joe Biden has fiercely defended America's interests, but he has always understood that our interests cannot be protected if we sacrifice our values. He will not make excuses for dictators in Cuba, Russia, or anywhere else. He is also a stalwart defender of U.S. allies, including Israel. I know Joe Biden will be ready on Day One to lead as our commander in chief. That's why Barack Obama chose him as his Vice President. Joe has the energy, the experience, and the moral courage that our nation deserves and the future demands. But he cannot do this alone. It's up to all of us to take a stand and do our part to support his fight in any way we can. I pledge to do everything in my power to help Joe defeat Donald Trump, and I'm asking you to do the same today. "" Thank you for standing up for American values. Madeleine Albright | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: House DFL Response
subject: Ivanka
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/u09Y1Q_q4G_4rHZ8IAa6714PAAv7CtT2QyLng2F3iBs=/ssqHIaZ5g-tRyeNd8SotjhsTOPuQsEMBtnhWsIFrCKs=)
| | Friend, Today, Ivanka Trump came to Minnesota to [open a "pop-up" federal office that could undermine the Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women's Task Force](https://act.myngp.com/el/u09Y1Q_q4G_4rHZ8IAa6714PAAv7CtT2QyLng2F3iBs=/ci3junPlD-Bc7gMk_nvCeTrKZAPpCoUQRUwds_OxODE=) that the Governor signed into law just a year ago. The Trumps are ignoring the voices of the People of Color and Indigenous (POCI) Caucus and the work of Indigenous women like Rep. Mary Kunesh-Podein, chief author and chair of the Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women's Task Force. Worse yet, no acknowledgement or invite was extended to task force members or policy makers to join this event. We shouldn't let the Trump Administration take credit or get in the way of the hard work of the POCI Caucus and the Task Force. Stand with us and help build on the progress that we worked so hard to achieve: [**Add your name**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u09Y1Q_q4G_4rHZ8IAa6714PAAv7CtT2QyLng2F3iBs=/WKf2VNRJDpwq01Rx0jTWKnP4HUtkc1kCdUXl4ZQpPvs=) With no information about this newly designated office, the Trumps have left our American Indian communities out of policy making once again - policies that have a direct affect on them and their traumatic past. This continued tokenism and neglect people of color and Indigenous communities are facing from the Trump administration needs to end. To the leaders who have worked so diligently for years to educate and resolve the pain and loss of native communities: we hear you, we see you, and we stand in solidarity. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u09Y1Q_q4G_4rHZ8IAa6714PAAv7CtT2QyLng2F3iBs=/QLMtXtiCCu2G7Sfpx06fqlAz2P-cpit8gi2LGh4BhYw=?refcode=072720)
---

#
Hello, It’s no secret that something is deeply broken in our politics. Corporate and special interests use their money to buy influence and get in the way of progress on the issues that matter to all of us. **No one is a clearer symptom of our broken politics than Congressman Jeff Van Drew of New Jersey.** Watching the rise of Donald Trump and his destruction of American norms of decency and respect, Van Drew felt motivated to change parties—not leaving the Republican Party, but joining it, and pledging his undying loyalty to Trump. No one like that has any place serving in the U.S. Congress. **Amy Kennedy can beat Van Drew and flip this seat.** She has the platform, the life experience as a former public school teacher, and the courage to win this race and get to work making a real difference for the people of South Jersey. **Will you join me in adding a donation to Amy’s campaign for Congress today? Amy is everything Jeff Van Drew is not. She’s a former public school teacher, a mental health advocate, and a mother of five. And she has the courage of her convictions.
**It’s clearer than ever that we need more leaders in Washington like Amy. People who will fight for everyday families -- not the big corporate interests corrupting our politics.**
But Van Drew and the powerful interests in his corner won’t go down without a fight. They’ve shown time and again they’ll spend whatever it takes to hold on to power.
Amy needs strong grassroots support to fight off that kind of money. So, I’m asking:

clean_body: | Hello, It’s no secret that something is deeply broken in our politics. Corporate and special interests use their money to buy influence and get in the way of progress on the issues that matter to all of us. No one is a clearer symptom of our broken politics than Congressman Jeff Van Drew of New Jersey. Watching the rise of Donald Trump and his destruction of American norms of decency and respect, Van Drew felt motivated to change parties—not leaving the Republican Party, but joining it, and pledging his undying loyalty to Trump. No one like that has any place serving in the U.S. Congress. Amy Kennedy can beat Van Drew and flip this seat. She has the platform, the life experience as a former public school teacher, and the courage to win this race and get to work making a real difference for the people of South Jersey. Will you join me in adding a donation to Amy’s campaign for Congress today? She isn’t taking a single contribution from the corporate PACs trying to capture our politics, so every grassroots contribution will go a long way: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Amy is everything Jeff Van Drew is not. She’s a former public school teacher, a mental health advocate, and a mother of five. And she has the courage of her convictions. It’s clearer than ever that we need more leaders in Washington like Amy. People who will fight for everyday families -- not the big corporate interests corrupting our politics. But Van Drew and the powerful interests in his corner won’t go down without a fight. They’ve shown time and again they’ll spend whatever it takes to hold on to power. Amy needs strong grassroots support to fight off that kind of money. So, I’m asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to help Amy build the kind of campaign she needs to flip this seat? In a race this close, every contribution makes a difference: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all that you do, Pete Buttigieg P.S. Please take care of yourself and family first and only contribute if it makes sense for you. If you would like to receive fewer fundraising emails,. Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress Amy Kennedy for Congress P.O. Box 247 Brigantine, NJ 08203 United States

name: Jessica Norfleet
subject: looking over the numbers
body:
---
| | | | | | Friend,
After another great day on the campaign trail with Kat, I am just sitting down now to look over the fundraising books with the finance team.
I'll be frank with you -- we're very short of our monthly goal in order to keep our ads running. Kat's opponents have deep pockets and are bankrolling their own campaigns, but we rely on the generous help of patriots like you.
As we head into the final weeks, momentum is on our side and polling continues to show Kat in a tie for first place.
[The truth is that we are in an extremely strong position to win this race, but Kat needs your help.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J-eXrqo1OR9oHcd8mq-6xCP0WEJlD7ubDFMNdVtl4S7Nnve64Qg_LaJBDEsSERWlHG2eRhJIgj9jU9iVt_v6A2l4N6R1BI8tizNNOXpWktO6eJR-C5iKy1AV1jHU46soa9wmMCN5790ys14A_AO0R8oVWv078N8g4_8l1TM-CZM=&c=1DF7dC8ndXBtGZ1-pebShB2y0VoRFxPiFHwuWbfsni70xLDO3I7Ypw==&ch=NbBqNmw3YiELrzzu6m9NUY3r6QsdmZ_KlgkYgrrsxF95Xg8t9I9x_w==)
This race will be tight, so every dollar counts.
---
| | | [Donate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J-eXrqo1OR9oHcd8mq-6xCP0WEJlD7ubDFMNdVtl4S7Nnve64Qg_LaJBDEsSERWlHG2eRhJIgj9jU9iVt_v6A2l4N6R1BI8tizNNOXpWktO6eJR-C5iKy1AV1jHU46soa9wmMCN5790ys14A_AO0R8oVWv078N8g4_8l1TM-CZM=&c=1DF7dC8ndXBtGZ1-pebShB2y0VoRFxPiFHwuWbfsni70xLDO3I7Ypw==&ch=NbBqNmw3YiELrzzu6m9NUY3r6QsdmZ_KlgkYgrrsxF95Xg8t9I9x_w==)

| [Please click the donate button above and consider chipping in whatever you are able to in order to help us raise enough to keep our ads running.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J-eXrqo1OR9oHcd8mq-6xCP0WEJlD7ubDFMNdVtl4S7Nnve64Qg_LaJBDEsSERWlHG2eRhJIgj9jU9iVt_v6A2l4N6R1BI8tizNNOXpWktO6eJR-C5iKy1AV1jHU46soa9wmMCN5790ys14A_AO0R8oVWv078N8g4_8l1TM-CZM=&c=1DF7dC8ndXBtGZ1-pebShB2y0VoRFxPiFHwuWbfsni70xLDO3I7Ypw==&ch=NbBqNmw3YiELrzzu6m9NUY3r6QsdmZ_KlgkYgrrsxF95Xg8t9I9x_w==)

name: Team Mackler
subject: POLL: Do you think it's safe for schools to reopen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
This is an issue that affects all of us.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0db/18d6a294/4c8b22c1/26d7e935/3313265327/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | As we approach the fall and Tennessee schools grapple with how to reopen in the middle of an unprecedented pandemic, _teachers are scared._ Tennessee lawmakers have left schools to determine how to reopen this fall, making reopening plans inconsistent and creating more questions than answers. Our Legislature is doing little to instill confidence in teachers, staff, students, and families as they get ready to go back to school. **A recent survey showed the majority of educators are uncomfortable with returning to school in person full time this fall**. As a result, teachers are considering taking leaves of absence, retiring early, or not returning at all this fall. **POLL: Do you think it 's safe for teachers, staff, and students to return to school this fall?** | [YES >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0db/18d6a294/4c8b22c1/26d7e932/3313265327/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200727poll") | | [NO >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0db/18d6a294/4c8b22c1/26d7e932/3313265327/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200727poll")
---|---|---
No one should be scared when going back to school.
But with more than 38,000 active COVID-19 cases in Tennessee, teachers are being forced to make an impossible decision between their jobs and their health and the health of their students.
Our campaign is built on communication. We always want to hear your thoughts -- especially about an issue that affects all of our families and communities.
[_**So please click here to take our poll and tell us if you believe it 's safe for teachers, staff, and students to return to school this fall ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0db/18d6a294/4c8b22c1/26d7e932/3313265327/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200727poll")
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: PHOTOS: President Trump welcomes ‘Walking Marine’ to the White House
body:
For six years, Terry Sharpe—or the “Walking Marine,” as he’s known—has completed seven 300-mile walks to raise awareness for veteran suicide. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85f92e1bfc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **PHOTOS****: President Trump welcomes ‘Walking Marine’ to the White House**

**For six years,** Terry Sharpe—or the “Walking Marine,” as he’s known—has completed seven 300-mile walks to raise awareness for veteran suicide.

**Today, 69-year-old Sharpe** completed his eighth and final walk, arriving in Washington all the way from Summerfield, North Carolina. He was joined by Second Lady Karen Pence at the Washington Monument, and the pair crossed the finish line on the South Lawn of the White House, where Sharpe was greeted by President Trump.

**Our country loses** an average of more than 20 veterans to suicide each day. President Trump has taken several important actions to help end this tragedy, including establishing the PREVENTS veteran suicide task force last March. Mrs. Pence serves as the task force’s lead ambassador.

**President Trump** has also secured a record $73.1 billion for the Department of Veterans Affairs and signed the VA MISSION Act into law in 2018, which revolutionized the VA healthcare system and restored much-needed accountability to the agency.

[_PHOTOS: President Trump welcomes Walking Marine Terry Sharpe!_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bb5736f67&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Congress didn’t act on prescription drug prices—so President Trump did**

**Americans have waited** decades for Washington to keep its promise to fix soaring prescription drug prices. Now, thanks to President Trump, that long wait is over.

🎬 [**President Trump just took historic action to lower medicine costs**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b23467f8b2&e=3ee4985eea)

**The President signed** four sweeping executive orders on Friday, which together will significantly lower the cost of prescription drugs while increasing access to life-saving medications such as insulin:
* **The first order** directs federally qualified health centers to pass along massive discounts on insulin and epinephrine from drug companies to low-income Americans.

* **The second order** will allow the safe, legal importation of prescription drugs from Canada and other countries where the price for identical drugs is lower.

* **The third order** will prohibit secret deals between drug manufacturers and pharmacy “benefit manager” middlemen, ensuring patients directly benefit from available discounts at the pharmacy counter.

* **The fourth order** ensures the United States pays the lowest price available among economically advanced countries for Medicare Part B drugs. The United States often pays 80 percent more for these drugs than other developed nations.

**“The four orders** that I’m signing today will completely restructure the prescription drug market, in terms of pricing and everything else, to make these medications affordable and accessible for all Americans,” President Trump said.

**In 2018, prescription drugs** saw their largest annual price decrease in more than half a century. Average basic premiums for Medicare Part D prescription drug plans have fallen by 13.5 percent since 2017, saving beneficiaries $1.9 billion in premium costs. Friday’s four executive orders build on this crucial progress.

**At the White House** on Friday, a number of Americans shared personal stories about the importance of lowering medicine costs for all patients.

🎬 [**WATCH: My premiums fell, and my coverage grew**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d94f9213bd&e=3ee4985eea)

**After her husband died** in an auto accident**,** Andrea Eckles ended up with more than $15,000 in medical debt when she had to switch healthcare plans. "I work in a very small dental office, and so my only choice for healthcare at that time was what I call the 'Unaffordable Care Act,'" she said.

**Paul Madden** has lived with insulin-dependent diabetes for 59 years. “Your work, sir, to ensure that insulin is affordable under Medicare will help guarantee that I and millions of seniors who take insulin realize healthier, more productive, independent, happier lives,” Mr. Madden told the President.

🎬 [**President Trump: We will finally allow the legal importation of drugs!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5870d9d93f&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ** : [**4 new orders will expand access to affordable medicine**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e24ab9f43&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump****, Veterans Affairs Secretary Robert Wilkie, and Second Lady Karen Pence with U.S. Marine Terry Sharpe, the “Walking Marine”** | July 27, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=651319b241&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4a2e34288&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9dd5f55d25)

body:

Our team is fired up (especially Nancy!), ready to go, and hellbent on... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/52d3604b1724/how-we-flip-the-house-2088238?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8036342af7&e=f1831b4ca2)

| Friends,

We can’t believe it, but there are less than 100 days left until Election Day 2020.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=7a6629cc99&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| That means we’re going to be engaged in an all-out sprint from here on out. Our team is fired up (especially Nancy!), ready to go, and hellbent on sending our opponent packing on November 3.

_But we can’t do it alone. We’re going to need your support every single step of the way if we’re going to win on Election Day. _

That’s why we set a goal of 100 individual donors (to commemorate crossing the 100-day threshold) before midnight on July 31.
---
| [Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3a946a2b2f&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation to Nancy’s campaign")
---
| Our race is one of the most competitive fights in the entire country. We’re gaining on our opponent and one of the latest polls showed us within one point of taking the lead!

It’s clear that our momentum is surging — that’s why Vice President Pence stopped by the Lowcountry last week to show his support for Nancy. He knows that this race is up for grabs, and he’s doing everything he can to help push us over the top. **_“Nancy Mace is an incredible American with an incredible American story, and she’ll be a leader from day one”_ \- Vice President Mike Pence **
But here’s the catch: our opponent is outspending us with help from liberal special interest groups and his friends in Washington.

**We need to match him step for step, and that starts with hitting monthly deadlines like this one. **

**[Will you become one of 100 donors who help us reach our end of month goal? Donate using the button below.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=babdfa7f75&e=f1831b4ca2)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: we’re in the home stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Four more years means better schools and more workforce training programs. Four more years means a stronger economy built to set more records again. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=acd6b4a372e24ec7b035a4128396f7ff&_e=DFNtatsX-omo163TGVBCW5yZ54H0T_JRLZBf4REUmR9P9pzbXpAQ6p57GEPQ_sEGCOwEr9ulAhmqVi9JTj1pkwHGbU40Wlr2XWxUK6OMVQJ4NdituCHzdjMyQ3tJNypx-_vG2Ripuc2kg8B5wpX_cuiOuYuU7BJpqER5z0BHONiEoYksXcw1FtGdGITnuL8Yk6X_ywo_ZyMRkIbEq9P2D0y-K3LmvA-KoF2Tad-ZtdwXxHyQVPh3KL50HKA-g178krMwPd0RCsMByLK9AUP_pGLbA7vSB-8uvCCPFBbvFIN1lbaqFGcF3oNfZRr9jOrnbvxY57KVz0Xy8gYz3JX4iTV8LdXvamxFxsNoTksmt04JwI1ZHAsqATqY36xMSalNRLvtaE1fcGEfu2pYvAT0cfiuCNUQX40SQYXVLTGmweMLoctB5nujj0A9K-kwxoBVO27Sy2tPQkNDzNHedmHgm0nxizg4H3e-xn-ZxRMp7aI%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We’re officially in the final sprint to Election Day 2020. **

There are now fewer than 100 days left until November 3rd (we know, we can’t believe it either).

That means there are going to be a lot of late nights and early mornings for our crew between now and Election Day, but friend, — we’re fired up for the final sprint.

**_We’re ready to go, but we can’t do this alone. We need to know that you’re 100% in._**
[**Become one of 100 Hoosiers who help us build One Indiana —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=acd6b4a372e24ec7b035a4128396f7ff&_e=DFNtatsX-omo163TGVBCW5yZ54H0T_JRLZBf4REUmR9P9pzbXpAQ6p57GEPQ_sEGCOwEr9ulAhmqVi9JTj1pkwHGbU40Wlr2XWxUK6OMVQJ4NdituCHzdjMyQ3tJNypx-_vG2Ripuc2kg8B5wpX_cuiOuYuU7BJpqER5z0BHONiEoYksXcw1FtGdGITnuL8Yk6X_ywo_ZyMRkIbEq9P2D0y-K3LmvA-KoF2Tad-ZtdwXxHyQVPh3KL50HKA-g178krMwPd0RCsMByLK9AUP_pJcTo8vRw6Q2AYgZHsvJsVjh5jL8lIP44yQ7zU1aeIAzW3JnZ0Oqa-hQtV4Zp2jlggH23I0pOzBmD_aZ85l3KtY4VnzrqPc3B6b3i7wkF4YnIl0UHenzlVvQGEYfRra9v1d81xUwVjf1dQO6PHQaq06NFFzGIyyRHqUZhSxS5ySD19adE2FEjouHdmGKyWgGoHSoxFyG0A8yldiu61KxrSs%3D)
_**That’s why we set a goal of 100 individual donors between now and midnight on July 31. **_

Friend, Indiana needs four more years of Eric’s experience and strong leadership.

_Four more years means better schools and more workforce training programs. Four more years means a stronger economy built to set more records again. Four more years means better roads and bridges (and finishing I-69!). _

Eric is locked in. He’s focused on the health of Hoosiers, and building One Indiana that works for Hoosiers from every walk of life. But he can’t do it alone, and he needs to know that he has the support of Hoosiers like you from every corner of our state.

If you believe in his mission to build One Indiana for every Hoosier and you want to help us reach our end of month goal, please chip in any amount below.
[**Become one of 100 Hoosiers who help us build One Indiana —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=acd6b4a372e24ec7b035a4128396f7ff&_e=DFNtatsX-omo163TGVBCW5yZ54H0T_JRLZBf4REUmR9P9pzbXpAQ6p57GEPQ_sEGCOwEr9ulAhmqVi9JTj1pkwHGbU40Wlr2XWxUK6OMVQJ4NdituCHzdjMyQ3tJNypx-_vG2Ripuc2kg8B5wpX_cuiOuYuU7BJpqER5z0BHONiEoYksXcw1FtGdGITnuL8Yk6X_ywo_ZyMRkIbEq9P2D0y-K3LmvA-KoF2Tad-ZtdwXxHyQVPh3KL50HKA-g178krMwPd0RCsMByLK9AUP_pGQFO2JCUtVxqQUGF4o9vMytpZypLTrqmuwig21CI7hhPfPH9mXiR0pTwvf1Bji5TuTjCC1KAjP9WQBCjKRbuMKn_wP2vxy5cWP7cCO8TdfkDU92iZoTX45z_ZGj-QWTqFpco4lQW1t2W6mqXwe6USrIzBwP1CR25hDvw08vqEHXeoyvpz2PLvWNTKQGvKX4x_CPOv2MzvChK0kLn_Zj6sE%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

name: Take Back The Senate (314 Action)
subject: we don't have much time to turn around the polling showing McConnell in the LEAD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest or taken part in our efforts. 314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7b7a/4bd7760e/50c9033a/77a93277/4128291627/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200727_1MNTL-6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_mcgrathpollsr2&source=314_EM_FR_200727_1MNTL-6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_mcgrathpollsr2")** to make a donation.

To get text message updates from 314 Action text 314 to 31498.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Our grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c733db5796a2/our-grassroots-movement?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I knew when I started this race in September of last year that our team of volunteers would grow and do amazing work to help us flip IL-16 from red to blue. Then the COVID-19 pandemic hit and we just didn't know what to expect.

**Our volunteers haven't missed a beat.** This grassroots group of over 400 volunteers has made over 4,000 phone calls to voters every week since the beginning of May, and they're picking up the pace as we go.

I'm so proud to have this group on my side, and because we know it's time to ramp up our efforts, **we are doubling our voter outreach goals from now until election day. This means we need to keep investing in our digital field plan. **

**[Click here to donate and invest in our virtual organizing strategy](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ebc245dde6&e=140a9b81e7)[!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0b58457f86&e=140a9b81e7)**

Our team is working hard to get the word out, and to let every voter know how they can safely cast their ballot this year in the midst of a pandemic, but **we need your help to make sure that we can keep this momentum going. **

I know we can win this race with the help of our amazing field team, and with you [**making a contribution to help expand our efforts.**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d8fd7a407a&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
