name: Raphael
subject: bumping this (Stacey's request for you)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend - did you see Stacey's request for you?
---
Stacey knows as well as I do that we can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats, give everyday Georgians a voice in their government and restore moral leadership to Washington. But we've got an uphill battle ahead, with my opponent, Kelly Loeffler, flooding this race with attack ads and spending $20 million of her own fortune to buy this seat.
That's why I need your help, friend. We're facing down our next critical fundraising deadline and if we want to flip Georgia blue, we can't afford to fall short of today's $25,000 goal. **Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this people-powered campaign - so I have to ask: **
**[Please, will you give $5 or more now- before midnight tonight - to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? With you, me and Stacey working together, I know we can win this fight. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e243/288179be/930caa1/348e00f1/3857949977/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDA2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks, friend, I really appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Abrams, Stacey
Subject: re: voter suppression in Georgia

| | |
---
Friend, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical.** In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone. The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region. The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality. That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first Black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e243/288179be/930caa1/348e00f2/3857949977/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDA2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit. For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state. **But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help power forward this historic campaign. ** **[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e243/288179be/930caa1/348e00f2/3857949977/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDA2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thank you for your support. Stacey Abrams

clean_body: Friend - did you see Stacey's request for you? Stacey knows as well as I do that we can - and must - win in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats, give everyday Georgians a voice in their government and restore moral leadership to Washington. But we've got an uphill battle ahead, with my opponent, Kelly Loeffler, flooding this race with attack ads and spending $20 million of her own fortune to buy this seat. That's why I need your help, friend. We're facing down our next critical fundraising deadline and if we want to flip Georgia blue, we can't afford to fall short of today's $25,000 goal. Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this people-powered campaign - so I have to ask: "" Thanks, friend, I really appreciate your support. Reverend Warnock \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Abrams, Stacey Subject: re: voter suppression in Georgia | | | Friend, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical. In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone. The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region. The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality. That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first Black senator our state has ever elected. "" Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit. For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state. But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help power forward this historic campaign. "" Thank you for your support. Stacey Abrams | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Investing in our future
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Though it may be hard to imagine now, there will come a day--hopefully within the next year--when we have a vaccine or effective treatment for COVID-19. We won't have to wear masks or worry about social distancing any more. We'll be able to attend concerts and sports games. But if we fail to make strategic investments now, the economic impacts of this crisis will continue to affect our state for years.
We need to get Rhode Islanders back to work. In order to come back stronger than ever after the COVID crisis, we need to create high-wage jobs and opportunities.
We need to build an inclusive recovery. Our communities of color and low-income workers have been some of the hardest hit in this crisis. This public health crisis has revealed the way zip code determines health and the economic crisis has revealed the degree to which many were left behind in our last recovery.
We need to double down on long-term investments. Now more than ever, it's critical that we make responsible decisions to both address our immediate needs and double down on the programs will allow us to bounce back quicker from a recession.
Experts agree that bonding is a smart, responsible way to spur economic growth during a financial crisis. With that in mind, today I put forward significant increases to my proposed FY21 bonds.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qG6H0Z6I8gSQiJCd4DmNXAtg7aYDxReMcYqzta3f6izU4RRVp2ISipCtSJw14Gh-c92j4x12x9rGcr2IiBb5AsZiTH25q0DKLglikxoTaTmJunRUlv-PfOccZlYi3Ez7EEihZrgFHKG9pxJf9u2T4Jgc2gdb0hVH0quGFW0Z1ImqTIWBkSXRYDhYlbk0X5fhMAPpzRFnM9o=&c=LFJ-0gURkl3wahQmhnJWcCZSa2Imor855O_AWE7MHEorqvklPljzMA==&ch=2ZQlSlu3dpGbEhwbER8ig4TWePz-K_KGnPXbJ543fg3Nm1ckcPG1Fw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qG6H0Z6I8gSQiJCd4DmNXAtg7aYDxReMcYqzta3f6izU4RRVp2ISipCtSJw14Gh-c92j4x12x9rGcr2IiBb5AsZiTH25q0DKLglikxoTaTmJunRUlv-PfOccZlYi3Ez7EEihZrgFHKG9pxJf9u2T4Jgc2gdb0hVH0quGFW0Z1ImqTIWBkSXRYDhYlbk0X5fhMAPpzRFnM9o=&c=LFJ-0gURkl3wahQmhnJWcCZSa2Imor855O_AWE7MHEorqvklPljzMA==&ch=2ZQlSlu3dpGbEhwbER8ig4TWePz-K_KGnPXbJ543fg3Nm1ckcPG1Fw==).
---
| That includes making an additional $40 million investment in affordable housing and community revitalization. We already had a shortage of affordable housing before this crisis, and the pandemic has only made things worse. This program will support the design, development, or repair of approximately 2,000 housing units across the state. It will also fund a competitive grant process to help communities recover from the economic and health impacts of COVID-19. I'm also proposing $107 million to create a new, state-of-the-art health laboratory for disease prevention and management. This facility will help improve our overall health care infrastructure, serve as a hub for innovation and research, and ensure that we're fully prepared for any new pandemic that may come our way. As we look to build a more resilient and equitable Rhode Island, it's critical that we make significant, long-term investments. The bond proposals I put forward today reflect the urgency of this moment and the opportunity before us. We can spur economic growth and create jobs while supporting our communities that have been hardest hit by this crisis--and to protect our future, we must.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qG6H0Z6I8gSQiJCd4DmNXAtg7aYDxReMcYqzta3f6izU4RRVp2ISiv5Wax4GKT2gpoHLedvVV498E-Kxc1BdLxRLCvhSNsdYnlGnSvW8WaqJCVKW3CPPeBTonb2Nci1Iiy9tinyemDS250cIu0odnVfwMxwokxgS1mRqAyBLOLoZ5bwO2Man8B5uHhXbTrvldwxzicFYCTXbd3kYvT8E14aExmuKtN65yFCic0msClgMM9scfHZwJnv8Ks0ErKxARqu-6uv9Hjp9zfcUYW6Cu5OnK5kN-WnwmMEgt6KsXbd4jirQBLNEj9zckkDi-6R8hBw878v3cwE=&c=LFJ-0gURkl3wahQmhnJWcCZSa2Imor855O_AWE7MHEorqvklPljzMA==&ch=2ZQlSlu3dpGbEhwbER8ig4TWePz-K_KGnPXbJ543fg3Nm1ckcPG1Fw==).

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Less than 100 days to Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

Today,
we're excited to share one of our most expansive efforts yet.

Powered by People is joining the Texas Democratic Party and the Texas
Coalition of Black Democrats to reach out and contact every Black voter in
Texas through the Black Voter Outreach Initiative.

The votes of Black Texans have been suppressed by Republicans and taken
for granted by Democrats for far too long. That's why we're individually
reaching out to every single Black voter in the state — to make sure that
they are registered to vote and to elevate the voices of Black candidates.

This is the most important election of our lives, and every vote matters.
And with less than 100 days to go until Election Day, we all need to do
the work, starting now. Will you volunteer a couple hours of your time
this week to call voters?

Please note: all phone banks are hosted by the Texas Democratic Party.

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34393?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1001&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Thursday, July 30
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34393?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1002&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34393?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1003&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34394?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1004&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Saturday, August 1
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34394?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1005&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]3pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34394?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1006&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34395?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1007&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Sunday, August 2
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34395?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1008&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]12pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/black-voter-outreach-initiative_attend/34395?source=ema20200727-99139&t=1009&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E ]Get more info or RSVP »

Reaching out to Black voters is a key component in our mission to elect a
Democratic majority in our State House — one that will work to end racial
gerrymandering and voter suppression — and to stop Trump's second term.

Thanks for being on this team. Hope to see you on the
phone bank!

— The Powered By People Team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=99139%2E444211%2EVVdL-E

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
